ddls:
CREATE TABLE "moves" (
  "move_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each move */,
  "move_name" TEXT /* Name of the move */,
  "variable_x" TEXT /* Variable 'X' that affects the move's behavior */,
  "n" REAL /* Attribute N value */,
  "p" REAL /* Attribute P value */,
  "r" REAL /* Attribute R value */,
  "h" REAL /* Attribute H value */,
  "f" REAL /* Attribute F value */,
  "w" REAL /* Attribute W value */,
  "g" REAL /* Attribute G value */,
  "e" REAL /* Attribute E value */,
  "d" REAL /* Attribute D value */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the move */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the player or developer who created the move */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the move was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the move was last updated */,
  "is_custom" INTEGER /* Boolean flag indicating if the move is user-generated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("move_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_modes" (
  "game_mode_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game mode */,
  "game_mode_name" TEXT /* Name of the game mode */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the game mode */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean flag indicating if the game mode is currently active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the game mode was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the game mode was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_mode_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the player */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the player's account */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the player account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the player account was last updated */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time when the player last logged in */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Player's rank or level */,
  "total_wins" INTEGER /* Total number of wins */,
  "total_losses" INTEGER /* Total number of losses */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "move_analytics" (
  "move_analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each move analytics entry */,
  "move_id" INTEGER /* ID of the move being analyzed */,
  "game_mode_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game mode being played */,
  "win_rate" REAL /* Win rate for the move in the game mode */,
  "usage_rate" REAL /* Usage rate for the move in the game mode */,
  "average_damage" REAL /* Average damage dealt by the move */,
  "average_healing" REAL /* Average healing provided by the move */,
  "average_duration" REAL /* Average duration of the move's effect */,
  "total_uses" INTEGER /* Total number of times the move has been used */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the analytics entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the analytics entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("move_analytics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_move_analytics_move_id FOREIGN KEY ("move_id") REFERENCES moves ("move_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_move_analytics_game_mode_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_mode_id") REFERENCES game_modes ("game_mode_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_moves" (
  "player_move_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player move entry */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player using the move */,
  "move_id" INTEGER /* ID of the move being used */,
  "game_mode_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game mode being played */,
  "date_used" TEXT /* Date the move was used */,
  "result" TEXT /* Outcome of the move (e.g., win, loss, draw) */,
  "damage_dealt" REAL /* Damage dealt by the move */,
  "healing_received" REAL /* Healing received by the move */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the move was used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_move_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_moves_game_mode_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_mode_id") REFERENCES game_modes ("game_mode_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_moves_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_moves_move_id FOREIGN KEY ("move_id") REFERENCES moves ("move_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "move_versions" (
  "move_version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each move version entry */,
  "move_id" INTEGER /* ID of the move being versioned */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the move */,
  "date_updated" TEXT /* Date the move was updated */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of changes in the version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the version was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("move_version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_move_versions_move_id FOREIGN KEY ("move_id") REFERENCES moves ("move_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_deck" (
  "player_deck_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player deck entry */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player owning the deck */,
  "move_id" INTEGER /* ID of the move in the deck */,
  "deck_order" INTEGER /* Order of the move in the deck */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the deck entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the deck entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_deck_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_deck_move_id FOREIGN KEY ("move_id") REFERENCES moves ("move_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_deck_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "move_tags" (
  "move_tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each move tag entry */,
  "move_id" INTEGER /* ID of the move being tagged */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the tag was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the tag was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("move_tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_move_tags_move_id FOREIGN KEY ("move_id") REFERENCES moves ("move_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "move_synergies" (
  "move_synergy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each move synergy entry */,
  "move_id_1" INTEGER /* ID of the first move in the synergy */,
  "move_id_2" INTEGER /* ID of the second move in the synergy */,
  "synergy_type" TEXT /* Type of synergy (e.g., buff, debuff, combo) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the synergy was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the synergy was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("move_synergy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_move_synergies_move_id_1 FOREIGN KEY ("move_id_1") REFERENCES moves ("move_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_move_synergies_move_id_2 FOREIGN KEY ("move_id_2") REFERENCES moves ("move_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_progress" (
  "player_progress_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player progress entry */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player making progress */,
  "game_mode_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game mode being played */,
  "progress_percentage" REAL /* Progress percentage for the player in the game mode */,
  "total_play_time" REAL /* Total time spent playing the game mode */,
  "last_played_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the player last played the game mode */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the progress entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the progress entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_progress_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_progress_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_progress_game_mode_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_mode_id") REFERENCES game_modes ("game_mode_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "move_statistics" (
  "move_statistics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each move statistics entry */,
  "move_id" INTEGER /* ID of the move being analyzed */,
  "game_mode_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game mode being played */,
  "win_rate" REAL /* Win rate for the move in the game mode */,
  "usage_rate" REAL /* Usage rate for the move in the game mode */,
  "average_duration" REAL /* Average duration of the move's effect */,
  "total_uses" INTEGER /* Total number of times the move has been used */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the statistics entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the statistics entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("move_statistics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_move_statistics_move_id FOREIGN KEY ("move_id") REFERENCES moves ("move_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_move_statistics_game_mode_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_mode_id") REFERENCES game_modes ("game_mode_id")
)
